item.title: check out these gorgeous designs
item.description:
On gorgeous women.
Created by Buki Ade, a Nigerian American fashion designer.
Born and raised in Nigeria, Buki’s family emigrated from Nigeria to the US when she was 8 years old. As the first born of a traditional Nigerian family, Ms. Ade was expected to study medicine and take care of her family with a “guaranteed” income. In fact, she dutifully obliged by enrolling in nursing school. Ultimately, she decided to explore her own creative path.
While on vacation one day, Ms. Ade was frustrated by the lack of diversity in the design of the swimsuits. None of the options spoke to the Afrocentric exceptionalism she desired to present. This, she attributed to the lack of diversity – more specifically the lack of African designers in the industry. Ms. Ade stepped in as a solution to this problem with the debut of her first collection in 2013.
Her brand is called BFyne
https://bfyne.com/
item.dc:creator: GarfunkyLennon

item.title: I’ve never been so…mlem
item.description: Part of me wants to shout from the rooftops because I FINALLY DID IT! The other part wants me to keep it as my dirty little secret, as I feel I should already be established. I just want my boys to be proud and remember the day I showed them my acceptance letter. I want them to know it’s ok to not have it all together when you’re 18 and starting over isn’t a sign of weakness. Red is rad. Blue will be rad soon, I hope.
item.dc:creator: synonymswirl

item.title: Platypus is excellent
item.description:
this is not Platypus. This is a stone. Moving on.
This is Penny the Platypus. She is excellent ! She came out an egg which was laid in an underground borrow. Platypus is one of only two mammals that lay eggs.
Phoebe the Platypus looks all cute because Platypus is all cute. However these back legs have a sneaky feature. The claws produce venom!
This is Pinocchio the Platypus. His quacker has no teeth inside and it feels rubbery to touch.
Meaning this man is a bit of a wimp 'caus the bite of Pumpkin the Platypus doesn't hurt much.
This is Princess Poppy the Platypus. She has a built in electro sensory system for finding food under water. She enjoys insect larvae, hawaiian pizza, freshwater shrimps, and crayfish.
Porker the Platypus has webbed feet to help him swim. The same as a water bird has. He can retract the webbed feet and expose his nails, allowing him to run on land.
Here's Pup Tart the Platypus. His fur is super thick to help him keep warm.
Peanut the Platypus has foldable covers for his eyes and ears as well as watertight nostrils. He swims with them shut and relies on his built in sensory system to navigate and hunt.
Here's Periwinkle the Platypus. He is excellent. Brother from another mother: https://imgur.com/gallery/1iGXqoR
item.dc:creator: jonjohnjonjohn

item.title: Man who earns £575,538 per year says we shouldn't exploit the current worker shortage to get a pay raise...
item.description: This fuckin' rat earns so much money that he can weather any storm without any effect on his life - but he recons the rest of us should just suck it up Edit: to add to the sheer hypocrisy this dick was Appointed Dec 2019 with salary of £495,000.... so during the pandemic he himself got a 16% raise https://www.bbc.co.uk/news/business-60206564?fbclid=IwAR3AsdnaZpT8vQ3emNU4T3i4q5OP9yY5Y0O04TrU8s2nI7Dio4is5Jj5xPo
